summary: Rubicon Center air defense units intercepted over 1,500 fixed-wing UAVs from Ukraine, with 75% belonging to 11 specific models, including 343 Leleka-100 and 132 Fury. Ukrainian drone operators conducted FPV strikes 50+ km into occupied Donetsk, hitting military and logistics vehicles. Russian forces reported that Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs have begun carrying two FPV drones each, prompting calls for enhanced anti-drone measures including detectors, shotguns, and AK rifle cartridges with anti-drone capsules. Additionally, ZALA Lancet operators successfully struck group targets despite electronic warfare interference, demonstrating tactics to cover multiple targets with single loitering munition deployments.
